neighborhoods.name: Coronado Town Center
neighborhoods.description: Beach resort community hub with commercial center, supermarkets, and gated residential areas
neighborhoods.character: Beach resort hub, commercial center, gated living

housing.predominantType: Condos, townhouses, and gated community houses

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Coronado. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: San Carlos / Gorgona
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent beach towns with newer developments and beach access
neighborhoods.character: Beach suburban, newer developments, more affordable
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Coronado's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Chame
neighborhoods.description: Inland town on the highway with local services and significantly lower costs
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Coronado Golf & Beach Club
neighborhoods.description: Established gated resort with golf, tennis, equestrian center, and the largest beach expat community
neighborhoods.character: Gated resort, golf and beach, largest expat beach community

housing.predominantType: Resort houses, villas, and premium condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
